title: AN ACT relating to menstrual discharge collection devices and making an appropriation therefor.
subject: Appropriations
Education, Elementary and Secondary
Effective Dates, Delayed
Taxation
Taxation, Sales and Use
Women

abstracts.abstract: Create a new section of KRS Chapter 158 to require each public school that includes any of grades six through 12 to provide free menstrual discharge collection devices to students; require each local board of education to adopt policies for the distribution of free menstrual discharge collection devices; define "menstrual discharge collection devices"; amend KRS 139.010 to define "menstrual discharge collection devices"; amend KRS 139.480 to exempt from sales and use tax the sale or purchase of menstrual discharge collection devices; APPROPRIATION; EFFECTIVE July 1, 2025.
